PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-30-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon reported that there is a Petition to Determine Heirship set for July 1, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and that the estate can not be closed until that petition is heard. Status on Accounting is taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
